questions.prompt: The ratio of red to blue marbles is 5:7. There are 15 red marbles. How many blue marbles are there?
The ratio of white eggs to brown eggs is 9:2. There are 12 brown eggs. How many more white eggs than brown eggs are there?
Which ratio is equivalent to 24:30 and is in simplest form?
The ratio of boys to girls in a classroom is 3:5. Which CANNOT be a total number of boys and girls in the classroom?
The lengths of two sides of a rectangle are in the ratio 2:5. The longest side of the rectangle is 15 cm. What is the area of the rectangle in square centimeters?
The lengths of the sides of a right triangle are in the ratio 3:4:5. The shortest side of the triangle is 12 inches long. What is the area of the triangle in square inches?
The ratio of peach trees to pear trees to apple trees in an orchard is 2:3:7. There are 21 apple trees in the orchard. How many more pear trees than peach trees are there?
The ratio x:9 is equivalent to the ratio 14:63. What is the value of x?
Two angles have a total combined measure of 90 degrees. The ratio of the measures of the angles is 2:3. What is the measure of the smaller of the two angles in degrees?

A bucket of golf balls has white golf balls and green golf balls in it. The ratio of white to green golf balls in the bucket is 12:5. There are 35 more white golf balls than green golf balls in the bucket. How many green golf balls are in the bucket?
